case.title: ROGERS v. CITY AND COUNTY OF DENVER

opinion.h: ROGERS v. CITY AND COUNTY OF DENVER, 386 U.S. 480 (1967)
386 U.S. 480"> ROGERS ET AL. v. CITY AND COUNTY OF DENVER ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF COLORADO. No. 998. Decided March 27, 1967.
opinion.p: Max P. Zall, Charles S. Rhyne, Brice W. Rhyne and Alfred J. Tighe, Jr., for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
